error_codes.message: You have exceeded your rate limit
error_codes.description: The API request has been rate limited. Check the Retry-After header and wait before retrying.

details.limit: Integer - Maximum requests per minute for your plan
details.reset_at: Integer - Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets
details.retry_after: Integer - Seconds to wait before retrying

error_codes.message: You have exceeded the rate limit for this endpoint
error_codes.description: A specific endpoint has a lower rate limit than your overall plan limit.

details.endpoint: String - The endpoint that has been rate limited
details.limit: Integer - Maximum requests per minute for this endpoint
details.reset_at: Integer - Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets
details.retry_after: Integer - Seconds to wait before retrying

error_codes.description: You have reached the maximum number of concurrent GPU jobs for this region.

details.region: String - AWS region where the limit was exceeded
details.current_jobs: Integer - Number of currently running jobs

error_codes.description: The API key provided is invalid, missing, or has been revoked.

details.key_prefix: String - The prefix of the provided key (nx_live_, nx_test_, nx_dev_)

error_codes.resolution: Provide a valid API key with the correct prefix for your environment.

error_codes.description: The provided authentication credentials are invalid.
error_codes.resolution: Verify your credentials and try again. For OAuth, ensure the token has not expired.

error_codes.message: Insufficient permissions to perform this operation
error_codes.description: Your API key does not have the required scopes or permissions for this operation.

details.required_scope: String - The scope required for this operation
details.current_scopes: Array - Scopes available to your API key

error_codes.resolution: Request an API key with the required scope or contact your administrator.

error_codes.message: The requested resource was not found
error_codes.description: The resource identified by the request does not exist.

details.resource_type: String - Type of resource that was not found
details.resource_id: String - Identifier of the resource that was not found

error_codes.description: The specified document does not exist or has been deleted.

details.document_id: String - The document ID that was not found

error_codes.description: The request body or parameters are invalid or malformed.

details.field: String - The field that failed validation
details.reason: String - The reason for validation failure

error_codes.description: The specified GPU count is not valid for GPU jobs.

details.provided_count: Integer - The GPU count that was provided

error_codes.resolution: Use a valid GPU count: 1, 2, 4, 8, or 16.

error_codes.message: The specified model does not exist
error_codes.description: The model referenced in the request cannot be found.

details.model_name: String - The model name that was not found

error_codes.description: The specified training job does not exist or has expired.

details.job_id: String - The training job ID that was not found

error_codes.description: The system is unable to allocate the requested GPU resources at this time.

details.available_gpus: Integer - Number of GPUs currently available
details.region: String - The region where allocation was attempted

error_codes.resolution: Retry the request later or reduce the number of GPUs requested.

error_codes.description: The system was unable to deliver a webhook event.

details.attempt_count: Integer - Number of delivery attempts made

error_codes.retry_policy: Up to 5 retry attempts with exponential backoff

error_codes.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server. The issue has been logged.
error_codes.resolution: If the issue persists, contact support with the request ID from the response headers.

error_codes.description: The service is undergoing maintenance or is temporarily unavailable.

details.expected_recovery: String - Estimated time of recovery if available

error_codes.resolution: Check the deployment window schedule (Tuesday-Thursday, 10 AM - 4 PM PST) for maintenance windows.

error_codes.description: A database operation failed. This may be a temporary condition.
error_codes.resolution: Retry the request. If the issue persists, contact support.

error_codes.description: The request body could not be parsed as valid JSON or has malformed structure.
error_codes.resolution: Ensure the request body is valid JSON and properly formatted.

error_codes.message: A required field is missing from the request
error_codes.description: The request is missing a required field.

details.field_name: String - The name of the missing required field

error_codes.message: The requested API version is deprecated
error_codes.description: The API version being used has been deprecated and will be removed.

details.deprecation_date: String - When v1 key creation stopped (March 1, 2025)

error_codes.resolution: Migrate to API v2. See the migration guide for details on breaking changes.

error_codes.message: Your access level does not permit this operation
error_codes.description: The resource requires a higher access level than your API key provides.

details.current_access_level: String - The access level of the API key

error_codes.description: The specified access level is not a valid value.

details.provided_value: String - The value that was provided
details.valid_values: Array - Valid access level values (PUBLIC, INTERNAL, CONFIDENTIAL, STRICTLY_CONFIDENTIAL)

error_codes.description: The specified data source category is not valid.

details.provided_value: String - The value that was provided

error_codes.description: The specified content type is not valid.

details.provided_value: String - The value that was provided
details.valid_values: Array - Valid content type values (RISK_FACTORS, FINANCIAL_STATEMENTS, MANAGEMENT_DISCUSSION, etc.)
